title: Integrations and Partnership Strategy
summary: Staged provider onboarding and partnership approach.

blocks.heading: Partnership strategy
blocks.content: Approach incumbent telematics providers as allies. DeltaCore acts as an AI enhancement layer through APIs, white-label products and revenue-sharing arrangements.

blocks.heading: PetroMan integration phases
bullets: Phase 1 — Read-only API integration (no operational change)
Phase 2 — Shadow-mode analytics (insights in DeltaCore only)
Phase 4 — Operational deployment with alerts and optional edge agents

blocks.heading: Data source catalog
bullets: PetroMan — fuel level, consumption, refuel events (Phase 1, primary)
AVA — GPS, engine hours, telemetry, faults (Phase 1, primary)
CAN/J1939 — engine and fuel rate via edge adapter (Phase 2)
Simulated data — CSV/generator for POC and demos (now)

blocks.heading: Integration framework requirements
bullets: Provider adapters translate APIs into canonical schema
Authentication rotation, rate limits, retries and audit trails
Equipment ID mapping between provider and DeltaCore records
